mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_document(project_id, plan_id, doc_type, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_ext, content_text, status, chunk_count, create_by, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{planId}, #{docType}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileExt}, #{contentText}, COALESCE(#{status}, 1), 0, #{createBy}, now(), now())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM project_document WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE project_document SET plan_id = #{planId}, file_path = #{filePath}, file_size = #{fileSize}, file_ext = #{fileExt}, content_text = #{contentText}, status = #{status}, create_by = #{createBy}, update_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE project_document SET status = 0, update_time = now() WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND file_path = #{filePath}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM project_document WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY doc_type, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM project_document WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM project_document WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE project_document SET chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, update_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE project_document SET status = 0, update_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
